name: Chaos at the Cosplay Convention
description:
You are trapped dead center in the main lobby of the world's largest anime and gaming convention. Over 130,000 cosplayers, gamers, and super-fans are packed shoulder-to-shoulder. The air smells like hairspray, sweat, and overpriced pretzels. It’s loud, it’s hot, and the exit is 70 yards away.

Suddenly, someone in the crowd points directly at you and screams. You have no idea who they think you are, but in an instant, the entire convention turns your way. Now, a massive tidal wave of brightly colored wigs, foam swords, and obsessive fans is charging right at you!

Your goal is simple: survive the most hilarious, high-stakes crowd crush ever imagined. You have to dodge, weave, and strategize your way to the front doors before you are hopelessly buried under a mountain of plush toys and sheer fandom. Can you escape the mob, or will you be hilariously crushed by a stampede of magical girls and space marines?

This version completely strips away the academic theories and tactical security jargon, leaving only the pure, adrenaline-fueled comedy of the situation. It tells the average user exactly what the world is, who the "enemy" is, and what they have to do to win.

Would you like to brainstorm a few of the random, quirky characters the user might bump into while trying to run for the exit?
creator: brogurt
